global.description: Global values are values that can be accessed from any chart or subchart by exactly the same name.
global.title: global

inspektor-gadget.description:
Values for the upstream inspektor-gadget (gadget) chart. When `enabled` is
true the gadget chart is installed and every value under `inspektor-gadget.*`
is passed through to it.
inspektor-gadget.title: inspektor-gadget

version.description: Version of the inspektor-gadget mission-control plugin
version.title: version
